title: Emissive Ores Addon for Bare Bones/Trailers Vision
description: A resource pack built for Optifine and Continuity to make ores visible in the aesthetic of the Minecraft Animated Trailers!
body:
It's missing gilded blackstone...mb, I'll add it. Also like the calibrated skulk sensor.

Emissive Ores Addon changes the following blocks to be emissive to fit the Bare Bones art style:

- Amethyst buds and blocks (Including Calibrated Sculk Sensors)

- All ores including nether quartz ore and nether gold ore except coal ore and redstone ore

- Raw ore blocks

- Enchanting Table

The resource pack requires Continuity by peppercode1 or Optifine to work.
Continuity: https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity

And the Bare Bones resource pack by robotpants equipped underneath it to work.
Get Bare Bones on Curseforge: [Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb)

OR

the Trailers Vision resource pack by DiamondIsntHere equipped underneath it to work.
Get Trailers Vision on Modrinth: [Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trailers-vision)


Ignore: "Are you sure you want to load this pack? This pack was made for an older version of Minecraft and may no longer work correctly." When loading this resource pack in 1.20 and later. I have tested this resource pack and it works perfectly fine.
